title: DfE update 17 December 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Action View your devolved continuing learners adult skills fund allocation for academic year 2025 to 2026   Information 16 to 19 funding arrangements for high value courses premium for academic year 2026 to 2027   Information 16 to 19 funding allocation and outturn statement R14 2024 to 2025   Information 2025 to 2026 funding claims guidance   Information Apprenticeship funding rules 2025 to 2026 – Version 3   Information 16 to 19 maths and English condition of funding 2026 to 2027   Information 2026 to 2027 high needs place change process – updated student numbers for 2024 to 2025 and 2025 to 2026 academic year   Reminder Further education workforce survey - final chance to share your views     Latest information for academies     Article Title     Information Schools, high needs, central school services and early years funding 2026 to 2027   Information 16 to 19 funding arrangements for high value courses premium for academic year 2026 to 2027   Information 2025 to 2026 funding claims guidance   Information 16 to 19 maths and English condition of funding 2026 to 2027   Information 2026 to 2027 high needs place change process – updated student numbers for 2024 to 2025 and 2025 to 2026 academic year   Events and webinars Academies chart of accounts and automation question and answer drop-in session   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement members only: Contract works workshop   Events and webinars Academies chart of accounts and automation question and answer drop-in session     Latest information for local authorities     Article Title     Action View your devolved continuing learners adult skills fund allocation for academic year 2025 to 2026   Information Publication of local authorities’ early years entitlements funding for 2026 to 2027   Information Schools, high needs, central school services and early years funding 2026 to 2027   Information 16 to 19 funding arrangements for high value courses premium for academic year 2026 to 2027   Information 16 to 19 funding allocation and outturn statement R14 2024 to 2025   Information 2025 to 2026 funding claims guidance   Information Apprenticeship funding rules 2025 to 2026 – Version 3   Information 16 to 19 maths and English condition of funding 2026 to 2027   Information 2026 to 2027 high needs place change process – updated student numbers for 2024 to 2025 and 2025 to 2026 academic year   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement members only: Contract works workshop    "
